---
name: Idea / Question
about: Something you're curious about, an approach worth exploring, or a question about the project
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

**Is this an idea or a question?**
(Question — I want to understand something / Idea — something worth exploring / Both)

**Related area**
(Model, relevance function, pressure controller, adapter contract, Hytale implementation, community implementation, benchmarks, observability, project direction, other)

**What's on your mind?**
Describe your idea or question. Concrete examples and references help but aren't required.

**Context**
Your background, the game/engine you work with, what prompted this — anything that helps us understand where you're coming from.
